title: TCW Launcher 0.2.0 Beta
summary: Working UI and backend milestone with corrected Galaxy Map sizing, Steam-linked profiles, server status, self-updates, and public install fallback links.
notes: Working launcher UI and backend milestone.
Corrected Galaxy Map embedding in windowed and fullscreen modes.
Keeps Steam-linked profiles and Arma name fallback online.
Adds public web fallback links for players blocked by Windows app reputation.
